ddls:
CREATE TABLE "video_resource_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each video resource format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the video resource format (e.g., AYUV, YUY2, NV12) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the video resource format */,
  "bit_depth" TEXT /* Bit depth of the video resource format */,
  "color_space" TEXT /* Color space used by the format */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the format is a standard format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the format */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the view format (e.g., R8G8B8A8_UNORM, R8G8_B8G8_UNORM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view format */,
  "bit_depth" TEXT /* Bit depth of the view format */,
  "color_space" TEXT /* Color space used by the view format */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the format is a standard format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the format */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "video_resource_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video resource format being mapped */,
  "view_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view format being mapped to */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Description of the meaning and usage of the mapping */,
  "view_channel_mapping" TEXT /* Details of the view channel mapping (e.g., V->R8, U->G8, Y->B8, A->A8) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the mapping is a custom mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_mappings_video_resource_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_resource_format_id") REFERENCES video_resource_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_mappings_view_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_format_id") REFERENCES view_formats ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "view_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the view type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the view type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_type_support" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each support entry */,
  "video_resource_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video resource format being supported */,
  "view_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view type being supported */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the support entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the support entry was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the support entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the support entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_type_support_video_resource_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_resource_format_id") REFERENCES video_resource_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_type_support_view_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_type_id") REFERENCES view_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., graphics engineer, developer, admin) */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  "last_login_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom format */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the custom format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom format */,
  "bit_depth" TEXT /* Bit depth of the custom format */,
  "color_space" TEXT /* Color space used by the custom format */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the format is a standard format */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the format */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the format */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the format was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_formats_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the custom mapping */,
  "video_resource_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video resource format being mapped */,
  "view_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view format being mapped to */,
  "meaning" TEXT /* Description of the meaning and usage of the custom mapping */,
  "view_channel_mapping" TEXT /* Details of the view channel mapping for the custom mapping */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User who created the mapping */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was created */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User who last updated the mapping */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the mapping was last updated */,
  "is_custom" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the mapping is a custom mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_mappings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the video resource format or mapping */,
  "video_resource_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the video resource format being accessed */,
  "view_format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the view format being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the video resource format or mapping was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_video_resource_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("video_resource_format_id") REFERENCES video_resource_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_view_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_format_id") REFERENCES view_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "format_search_history" (
  "search_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each search event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the search */,
  "search_query" TEXT /* Search query used to find video resource formats */,
  "search_date" TEXT /* Date when the search was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("search_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_format_search_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the permission applies */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_formats, edit_mappings) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
